message:
Add comprehensive useDebounce hook unit tests

Adds 25 unit tests covering both useDebounce and useDebouncedCallback:

useDebounce:
- Initial value and isPending state
- Debounce timing and value updates
- Rapid changes (only last value applied)
- Timer reset on each change
- Immediate values (empty, null, undefined skip delay)
- Delay changes
- Cleanup on unmount

useDebouncedCallback:
- Delayed callback execution
- Multiple args handling
- Cancel function prevents pending calls
- Callback reference updates
- Cleanup on unmount

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-irv6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
